templates.label: Starter (Java / Maven) — Camunda client hello + job worker

toolchain.installHint: Install Apache Maven (brew install maven, apt install maven, or download from https://maven.apache.org/install.html) so `mvn` is on PATH. Requires a JDK 17+ (java -version).
